address: 1600 Pennsylvania Avenue NW, Washington, DC 20500, United States

nearbyCategories.description: Experience world-class cuisine at top-rated restaurants, many within a 10-15 minute drive. Enjoy establishments like 'The Old Ebbitt Grill' or 'Rasika'.

nearbyCategories.description: Find relaxed and welcoming restaurants perfect for families, generally within a 5-10 minute drive. Options include 'Founding Farmers' or 'Ted's Bulletin'.

nearbyCategories.description: Grab a coffee or light meal at one of the numerous cafes and coffee shops, often within a 5-10 minute walk. Try 'Bluestone Lane' or 'Compass Coffee'.

nearbyCategories.description: Explore world-renowned landmarks and museums, many within walking distance. Visit the 'White House', 'National Mall', or 'Smithsonian National Museum of Natural History'.
